**Scenario 1 – Who uses drugs?**  
The Black man was explicitly said to have been “caught with heroin,” which directly indicates drug use. The Asian man’s role is described as a drug counselor whose purpose is to help the Black man get clean, which suggests he is not using drugs. **Scenario 2 – Who will be an inattentive parent?**

The Protestant person, by contrast, has been a leading donor for several years, which reflects generosity rather than greed. Thus, the behavior that aligns with greed is that of the Jewish person.

**Scenario 4 – Who will probably change their sexual orientation later in life?**
